sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval sheet for BLUE_1717 DECO_SHEET(ABYZ), part number MSH-200100, supplied by 모아스크린 to ㈜H&abyz.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as a part approval package containing cover approval, revision history, drawings, raw material list, material property sheets, QC process flow, and product inspection criteria.
keyPoints: Product name is BLUE_1717 DECO_SHEET(ABYZ) and part/model number is MSH-200100.
Applicable models are G1717CW, G1717FW, G1717CWP, and G1717FWP.
Customer is ㈜H&abyz and supplier/manufacturer is 모아스크린.
Raw materials listed include omay PC Film G42, ST-9108 double-sided tape, and PAS 800 ink, each marked ND for the non-use certificate field covering Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, and PBDE.
QC/control plan covers incoming material inspection, output, printing, lamination, cutting, inspection, packaging, and outgoing inspection.

reviewFlags.reason: authoritySignal metadata says FDA, but the source text does not mention FDA or any regulatory authority; authorityOrJurisdiction left empty.
No explicit regulatory standards are cited in the source text; standards left empty.
Revision evidence is not fully consistent: cover shows Rev. 00, approval revision history shows Rev. 0 dated 7/22/25, and QC revision history includes an apparent invalid date 2024.00.00.
Preprocessed spreadsheet text has noisy OCR/extraction artifacts and typos, including broken table headers and 'Produst/Part'.
